name: CreateCustomer
description: SuperAdmin creates a new customer with name uniqueness check and SMSSendAs length validation. Creates default SubscriptionSetting and maps user roles.

name: UpdateCustomer
description: Updates Customer settings. Role-gated: ManageCustomer/SubscriptionModule for basic fields; SuperAdmin for Name, Segment, MaxLicenses, EconomicId. Publishes CustomerUpdatedEvent. Propagates SMSSendAs/VoiceSendAs change to system profile.

name: GetCustomer
description: Resolves customer by Id, PublicGuid, or current WorkContext. Returns CustomerModel with SubscriptionSetting, WebMessageSetting, StandardReceiverSetting.

name: ManageCustomerLogo
description: Upsert customer logo: if existing blob exists → update; else → create new CustomerLogo. Accepts base64 string + Width/Height. SuperAdmin can delete logo.

name: ManageCustomerUsers
description: Add or remove User↔Customer mappings. AddUser creates CustomerUserMapping; RemoveUser deletes mapping and clears user-access cache entry.

name: ManageApiKeys
description: CRUD operations on CustomerApiKey entities. Create, Delete, Update, GetByType, GetByCustomer.
